summary: Tested Condition Auto-Effects system for ROOK TTRPG app. All features working correctly: condition toggling, effects summary bar, skill/save indicators (▲/▼/✕), attack banners, and D&D 5e advantage/disadvantage cancellation rule.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test character TEST_HERO_1773389545537
context_for_next_testing_agent: Condition Auto-Effects system fully implemented and tested. All D&D 5e conditions work correctly with proper visual indicators.

login_flow.details: Login with test credentials works correctly, redirects to /home

player_character_page.details: Character page loads, combat tab accessible

conditions_panel.details: Conditions button expands panel showing all 16 D&D 5e conditions

poisoned_condition.details: Poisoned toggles on (red pill), EFFECTS bar shows 'Attacks: DISADV' and 'Ability Checks: DISADV', skills show red ▼ indicators, attack section shows '▼ DISADVANTAGE on attacks' banner

paralyzed_condition.details: Paralyzed shows 'STR Saves: AUTO-FAIL' and 'DEX Saves: AUTO-FAIL' in effects bar, STR and DEX save buttons show ✕ auto-fail indicator

invisible_condition.details: Invisible shows 'Attacks: ADV' in effects bar, attack section shows '▲ ADVANTAGE on attacks (Invisible: advantage)' green banner

advantage_disadvantage_cancellation.details: When both Poisoned (disadvantage) and Invisible (advantage) are active, they cancel out per D&D 5e rules - no attack banner shown, effects bar shows 'Ability Checks: DISADV' only

quick_dice_bar.details: Visible at bottom with d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20, D% buttons (data-testid: quick-dice-bar)

hp_tracker.details: HP bar with DMG/HEAL buttons and input field visible (data-testid: hp-tracker, hp-damage-btn, hp-heal-btn, hp-input)

conditionEffects_data_file.details: /app/frontend/src/data/conditionEffects.js contains CONDITION_EFFECTS mapping for all 16 conditions, getConditionRollEffect() function, and getConditionIndicator() function
